user.title: Add album slideshow
user.description: Choose a source for the slideshow.

google_shared.title: Google Photos
google_shared.description: Paste a Google Photos shared album share link.

local_folder.title: Local Folder
local_folder.description: Pick a folder path on your Home Assistant filesystem. Use /local/... (maps to /config/www/...) or /media/local/... for NAS-mounted media folders. See the README for details.

brightwheel_credentials.title: Brightwheel
brightwheel_credentials.description: Sign in to your Brightwheel guardian account. The integration uses the same private API as the Brightwheel app; only photos shared with you are accessed. A 2FA code may be emailed to you on the next step.

brightwheel_2fa.title: Brightwheel 2FA
brightwheel_2fa.description: Brightwheel just emailed you a verification code. Enter it below.

brightwheel_students.title: Brightwheel students
brightwheel_students.description: Found {count} student(s). Pick which ones to include in the slideshow (leave all selected for everyone).

error.invalid_album_url: That does not look like a Google Photos shared album link.
error.no_students: No students found on this Brightwheel account.
error.unknown: Something went wrong. Check the Home Assistant log.

abort.reauth_unknown: Could not find the Brightwheel entry to re-authenticate.
abort.reauth_not_supported: Re-authentication is only supported for the Brightwheel provider.
